title: Run live sample and view analyzed result panels
description: Verifies a user can analyze the live sample and reaches /result with both original Marathi and canonical English panels displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Submit the live sample for analysis
Wait for the loading overlay to disappear
Verify the user lands on the result page
Verify original Marathi and canonical English are displayed side-by-side

title: Paste Marathi text and view side-by-side analysis result
description: Verifies a user can paste Marathi text, submit analysis, and see original Marathi and canonical English on /result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill Marathi text into the paste-text input
Submit the analysis request
Wait for the loading overlay to disappear
Verify the user lands on the result page
Verify original Marathi and canonical English are displayed side-by-side

title: Analyze uploaded Marathi PDF and verify extracted Marathi is non-empty
description: Verifies a user can upload a Marathi PDF, run analysis, and see a non-empty Marathi source alongside canonical English on /result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Upload a valid Marathi PDF file
Submit the analysis request
Wait for the loading overlay to disappear
Verify the user lands on the result page
Verify the Marathi source content is displayed and appears non-empty

title: Request plain-language explanation and key actions independently and append results
description: Verifies a user can request a plain explanation and key actions separately on /result and both outputs appear without overwriting each other.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Submit the live sample for analysis
Wait for the loading overlay to disappear
Request a plain-language explanation
Wait for the explanation section to appear
Request extracted key actions
Verify a plain-language explanation section is displayed
Verify a key actions section is displayed

title: Generate selected Indian-language outputs without rerunning full analysis
description: Verifies a user can choose target languages on /result and generate localized outputs that append to the existing result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Submit the live sample for analysis
Wait for the loading overlay to disappear
Open the language selector
Select two target Indian languages
Request generation of the selected language outputs
Verify new localized language output sections appear in the result view
Verify original Marathi and canonical English remain displayed alongside the new outputs

title: Live sample result remains stable during in-page interaction
description: Verifies that after the live sample analysis completes, interacting with the result page does not reset or lose the analyzed document state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Submit the live sample for analysis
Wait for the loading overlay to disappear
Scroll through the result view
Open and close any collapsible context section on the result view
Verify original Marathi and canonical English remain displayed for the same analyzed document

title: Live sample glossary highlighting and details deep dive
description: Verifies glossary-linked terms are inspectable from the live sample result and the details view loads document context successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Submit the live sample for analysis
Wait for the loading overlay to disappear
Hover a highlighted glossary term in the Marathi panel
Click to open the result details view
Verify glossary match context is shown for the inspected term
Verify the details view shows setup and quality context for the current document

title: Inspect glossary-linked term tooltip and context in the result view
description: Verifies that hovering a highlighted glossary term in the result view shows a glossary match tooltip/context for the currently displayed document.

steps.description: Navigate to /result
Wait for the result content to finish loading
Hover over a highlighted glossary-backed term in the Marathi panel
Verify a glossary match tooltip or inline context is displayed
Hover over a highlighted glossary-backed term in the English panel
Verify a glossary match tooltip or inline context is displayed

title: Open details view from the result and view setup and quality context
description: Verifies that a user can navigate from the result view to details and see setup summary plus quality context load successfully for the current document.

steps.description: Navigate to /result
Wait for the result content to finish loading
Click the control to open the expanded details view
Wait for the details content to finish loading
Verify a localization/setup summary section is displayed
Verify a quality summary section is displayed

title: View glossary status and metadata on the hidden glossary page
description: Verifies that operators can open the hidden glossary page and see glossary status, source metadata, and sync timestamps rendered.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo/glossary
Wait for the glossary page content to finish loading
Verify glossary status information is displayed
Verify source metadata and sync timestamp information is displayed

title: Avoid duplicate language outputs when requesting the same language twice
description: Verifies requesting generation for a language that is already generated does not create duplicate output sections on /result.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the live sample entry point
Submit the live sample for analysis
Wait for the loading overlay to disappear
Open the language selector
Select one target Indian language
Request generation of the selected language output
Request generation for the same language again
Verify only one output section exists for that selected language

title: Run baseline quality comparison from details and display comparison output
description: Verifies that the details view can trigger a baseline comparison and render comparison results without leaving the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /result/details
Wait for the details content to finish loading
Click the control to run the baseline quality comparison
Wait for the comparison to finish
Verify quality comparison results are displayed

title: Glossary highlights remain aligned with panels after scrolling
description: Verifies that glossary term highlighting and hover inspection remain functional after the user scrolls within the result panels.

steps.description: Navigate to /result
Wait for the result content to finish loading
Scroll within the Marathi panel to later content
Hover over a highlighted glossary-backed term in the Marathi panel
Verify a glossary match tooltip or inline context is displayed
Scroll within the English panel to later content
Hover over a highlighted glossary-backed term in the English panel
Verify a glossary match tooltip or inline context is displayed

title: Inspect glossary status on hidden demo page
description: Verifies an operator can access /demo/glossary to view glossary status and sync metadata and the page exposes no edit actions.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo/glossary
Verify glossary status and source metadata are displayed
Verify the page is read-only and does not present any edit controls

title: Gracefully handle documents with no glossary matches in result view
description: Verifies that when no glossary terms are highlighted, the result view remains usable and communicates the empty glossary-match state without errors.

steps.description: Navigate to /result
Wait for the result content to finish loading
Scroll through the Marathi and English panels to look for highlighted glossary terms
Verify an empty glossary-match state is displayed or no terms are highlighted while the panels remain readable

title: Glossary status page is read-only and shows no edit actions
description: Verifies that the hidden glossary page does not present any controls that would allow editing glossary data.

steps.description: Navigate to /demo/glossary
Wait for the glossary page content to finish loading
Scroll through the glossary page
Verify no edit, add, delete, or save actions are available on the page

title: Show validation when submitting analysis with no input
description: Verifies submitting analysis without pasted text or a valid PDF shows a client-side validation error and does not proceed to results.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Submit the analysis request
Verify a validation error is visible indicating missing or invalid input
Verify the user remains on the landing page
